# FormosanBank Copilot Instructions

This repository contains Indigenous language corpora and corpus-derived materials with strict licensing and attribution requirements.

Do not reproduce corpus text, translations, transcriptions, audio paths, examples, or dataset rows unless the user explicitly asks for a short quotation for repository maintenance, validation, or debugging.

Do not suggest code, documentation, or workflow changes that remove, weaken, or hide FormosanBank license, attribution, provenance, source, TDM, or no-commercial-AI notices.

Commercial AI Use of FormosanBank materials is prohibited without prior written permission. See `AI-USE-ADDENDUM.md`, `NOTICE-AI.md`, and `LICENSE.md`.
